name: com.psigenvision.taggingandmaskingsystem
description: A lightweight and efficient tagging and masking system for Unity designed as a flexible replacement for restrictive enums. This package enables the use of customizable bitmask-based categories stored as integer- or byte-types, with user-friendly dropdown selection in the Unity Inspector whose labels are defined using swappable scriptable objects.

samples.description: Provides a simple scriptable object with various serializations of int and byte mask fields, some of whose dropdown can be changed by interchanging its TaskMaskLibrary/ByteTagMaskLibrary object reference with any of the available scriptable objects
